item.title: ☕ PerfectXM/mcp-db-server (77 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: PerfectXM

📝 Repository: PerfectXM/mcp-db-server

📄 Descrizione: 🔥 让 AI 直接操刀你的数据库！无状态 MCP 数据库服务，支持 MySQL / PostgreSQL / SQLite / SQL Server / Oracle / H2，连接参数即传即用，零持久化零配置。

⭐ Stelle: 77

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: ai java mcp

item.title: ☕ kuohsuanlo/LazyContainerAgent (52 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: kuohsuanlo

📝 Repository: kuohsuanlo/LazyContainerAgent

📄 Descrizione: Java agent for Minecraft server platform PaperMC that lazily deserializes chest/container items — removes the chunk-load NBT unpack lag from large storage and map-art. Zero data risk (shadow-validated).
